heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1720 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of two hundred and seventy days after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 1, 1968section 1423 of Pub. L. 90–448section 1701 of this title
